mapper.select: SELECT COMM_CODE, CODE_NAME, CODE_EXPL, USEE_YSNO, REGE_ADMN, REGI_DATE FROM TM_CODEXM ORDER BY COMM_CODE
SELECT COMM_CODE, CODE_NAME, CODE_EXPL, USEE_YSNO, REGE_ADMN, REGI_DATE FROM TM_CODEXM WHERE COMM_CODE = #{commCode}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TM_CODEXM ( COMM_CODE, CODE_NAME, CODE_EXPL, USEE_YSNO, REGE_ADMN, REGI_DATE ) VALUES ( #{commCode}, #{codeName}, #{codeExpl}, #{useeYsno}, #{regeAdmn}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT COMM_CODE, COMD_CODE, COMD_NAME, CODE_EXPL, USEE_YSNO, REGE_ADMN, SORT_ORDER FROM TB_CODEXD WHERE COMM_CODE = #{commCode} ORDER BY NVL(SORT_ORDER, 9999), COMD_CODE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_CODEXD ( COMM_CODE, COMD_CODE, COMD_NAME, CODE_EXPL, USEE_YSNO, REGE_ADMN, REGI_DATE, SORT_ORDER ) VALUES ( #{commCode}, #{comdCode}, #{comdName}, #{codeExpl}, #{useeYsno}, #{regeAdmn}, SYSDATE, #{sortOrder} )
mapper.select: SELECT COMD_NAME FROM ( SELECT COMD_NAME FROM TB_CODEXD WHERE COMD_CODE = #{comdCode} AND NVL(USEE_YSNO, 'Y') = 'Y' ORDER BY COMM_CODE ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
